reasoning.evidence: Content explicitly mentions 都度起動バッチ (on-demand batch) and 常駐バッチ (resident batch), references loop control handlers (process_resident_handler, loop_handler, request_thread_loop_handler), and includes nablarch-fw-batch module dependency. The handler is designed to stop batch processes by checking a process halt flag.
No mention of Jakarta Batch, JSR 352, jBatch, Batchlet, Chunk, or javax.batch.
No mention of RESTful, JAX-RS, REST API, @Produces, @Consumes, or JaxRsMethodBinder.
No mention of HTTPメッセージング, HTTP受信, メッセージ同期応答, or HttpMessagingRequestParsingHandler.
No mention of Webアプリケーション, サーブレット, JSP, HttpRequest, or セッション管理.
No mention of MOMメッセージング, MQ, キュー, 非同期メッセージ, or MomMessagingAction.
No mention of DB連携メッセージング, テーブルキュー, 電文, or DatabaseRecordReader. Although DB access is used internally to check the halt flag, this is not DB messaging pattern.
